audit_items.proof_trace: RM_SetDisconnectCallback dereferences bc pointer without validation. bc can be freed in moduleHandleBlockedClients after RM_UnblockClient, and module can call RM_SetDisconnectCallback after freeing, causing use-after-free. No mechanism ensures bc remains valid.
audit_items.attack_scenario: Malicious module can call RM_SetDisconnectCallback after unblocking client, causing memory corruption and potentially arbitrary code execution.
